milestoneTitle: Phase M9.16n — Second-wave audit chunk. (1) Taskgrid type pills and type-legend items migrated from border-radius 999px to var(--radius-sm) — same design-language fix applied to card-pill and tutorial-toggle in M9.16l. (2) Added a shared :focus-visible ring (2px var(--accent-border) outline + 2px offset) across 15 interactive elements inside modals (tool/doc/video/yt/backup/storage/lesson/recipe close buttons + tool-modal-link + snippet-copy + setup-copy + doc-modal-open + doc-modal-blocked-cta + video-modal-open + video-modal-expand). Keyboard users now get a clear focus indicator matching the existing .recipe:focus-visible / .cap-input:focus-visible pattern. No other audit items shipped — timeline SVG would have changed colors, backup-modal-json dark bg is judgement-call code-block convention, focus-missing-transition on subpill-select is trivial.
